name: sky-chart
_note: astronomy.sky-chart is a pure-ephemeris LENS_ACTIONS handler (Meeus GMST + equatorial→horizontal for 30 catalogued bright stars + Sun + Moon). The handler body is wrapped in try/catch and returns {ok:false,error:'handler_error'} rather than throwing. parseObserver() clamps latitude to [-90,90] and longitude to [-180,180], so even poisoned 1e308 coords yield a finite, in-range observer and never a NaN altitude — the invariants above pin that all star alt/az stay finite and moon illumination stays in [0,1]. A missing or non-numeric observer is rejected with 'latitude and longitude required'. LENS_ACTIONS-only registration; SkyChartWorkbench drives it via /api/lens/run.
